name: Cabin 003
description: Nestled in a serene coastal village, this charming retreat offers rustic elegance with modern comfort. Featuring two bedrooms, a cozy fireplace, and ocean-facing windows, guests enjoy peaceful mornings and scenic sunsets. A private deck and hot tub complete the experience.

name: Cabin 004
description: Located near a tranquil forest reserve, this spacious cabin blends nature and luxury. With three bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and outdoor seating, it’s perfect for families seeking relaxation and fresh air.

name: Cabin 005
description: A cozy one-bedroom hideaway ideal for couples, featuring warm wooden interiors, a compact kitchen, and a balcony overlooking lush greenery. Perfect for a quiet romantic getaway.

name: Cabin 006
description: This large lakeside cabin accommodates groups with ease. It includes four bedrooms, a spacious living area, and direct lake access for kayaking and fishing adventures.

name: Cabin 007
description: Surrounded by rolling hills, this charming cabin offers panoramic views and modern amenities. Guests can relax by the fireplace or enjoy evenings on the outdoor patio under the stars.

name: Cabin 008
description: A minimalist retreat designed for comfort and simplicity. With clean interiors, natural lighting, and proximity to hiking trails, it’s ideal for solo travelers or small groups.

name: Cabin 009
description: Experience luxury in this modern cabin featuring sleek design, smart home features, and a spacious terrace. Perfect for entertaining or relaxing in style.

name: Cabin 010
description: Tucked away in a quiet countryside setting, this comfortable cabin offers two bedrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a peaceful garden area for unwinding.
